name: agent-launch-toolkit
description: AgentLaunch Toolkit — SDK, CLI, MCP server, and templates for AI agent token launches

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/sdk -w packages/templates && npm run build -w packages/cli -w packages/mcp
scripts.prepublish:all: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:publish
scripts.publish:all: npm run prepublish:all && npm publish -w packages/sdk && npm publish -w packages/templates && npm publish -w packages/cli && npm publish -w packages/mcp
